resources.string: Please run under the owner account!
There is no Keyboard theme.\nYou can create the Keyboard theme on the Theme park app.
Speak out loud and invite happiness.
This is Samsung Keyboard Product Manager.
A Little Step for the Best Keyboard!
Item at position %d cannot be dragged.
Reset keyboard to its default settings?
Replace your current keyboard layout or enter a new name to save it as a new layout.
Name your keyboard layout to save it.
Show off your Samsung keyboard typing skills.
Customize your keyboard setting in detail.
Can\'t use Keys Cafe. Update Samsung Keyboard and try again.
This function requires ThemePark. Go to the Galaxy Store to download ThemePark.
Create and edit custom sticker sets that you can use with Samsung Keyboard.
Missing /sdcard/DCIM/Camera folder for crop Image. please make folder in this path
The sticker center version is low.
A set of stickers is installed as the same name.
Save your change or discard them?
Create and edit custom sticker sets.
This file isn\'t supported on this device.
Customize the key locations and function keys.
Try out with various colors and effects.
ខ្មែរយូនីកូដ
Same number keys cannot be added more than once.
Same text keys cannot be added more than once.
Can\'t save keyboard.\nAdd all starred keys first.
Enter the word or phrase you want to add.
Can\'t drop this key here. Drop it between keys or into a key pop-up to add it.
Can\'t put a key of different type than the key type on page 1.
Can\'t put the function key to flick
You can only use numbers, letters, symbols for Flick.
My only one keyboard in the world
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
You can use My meme from the keyboard sticker suggestion in larger view. Would you like to turn on the setting?
The abnormal animator duration.\nCheck your developer option
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Keys Cafe uses an image file in your device to create your own sticker.
Keys Cafe uses an image file in your device to create your own sticker and Meme.
To use this feature, you need to allow permission in Settings.
You can still use the app\'s basic functions without allowing the optional permissions
Type quickly and become the best typer.
Can\'t add any more new rows.
Keyboard must have at least 3 rows.
The number of rows on the left/right keyboard must be the same.
Type fast to become the best typist.
Double tap to switch to calendar view.
Double tap to switch to Month-Day-Year view.
Double tap to switch to wheel view.
Swipe up or down with two finger to adjust
Can you remove all the words?

For recognized words, when you tap ㄱ, ㄷ, ㅂ, ㅅ, or ㅈ twice quickly at the end of a syllable, Samsung Keyboard will automatically determine whether to enter the character twice, once at the end of the current syllable and once at the start of the next syllable, or to combine the characters as ㄲ, ㄸ, ㅃ, ㅆ, or ㅉ. For example, if you tap ㅎㅏㄱㄱㅗㅗ, the result will be 학교, not 하꾜.
Enter the combination of consonants and vowels.
Add words to prevent single-vowel collisions.
To use Keys Cafe, Samsung Keyboard as your default keyboard.
The effect is not displayed if the Animator duration scale is 0.\nGo to Setting → Developer Options → Animator duration scale and turn off Animation off
If you press the checked effect again, it will turn off.
You can do it by pressing the round paint button in the effect page.
Even though I set the effect, can\'t see it.
How can i turn off one of the effects?
How to set the color I want for the effect?
If you use the smart switch to add a \"KeysCafe\" to the Restore app and restore your device, the keyboard layout will also be restored.
How to get the keyboard layout from my old phone back to my new phone?

Simple, press the \"Make your own keyboard\" tab on the first screen of the Keys Cafe, press the switch on the top, press the + button on the desired language, select the keyboard of the desired type, and then click Edit Button to start.
Yes, press the key you want to erase, push the trash button on the toolbar or drag the key you want to erase, and throw it up.
You can drag the key you want at the top of the keyboard layout page and put it in the desired location on the keyboard. The desired key is classified according to the category.
You should turn on alternative characters option in keyboard setting.\nkeyboard setting → Layout → Alternative characters
Press the \"+\" button on Make your own Keyboard You can check multiple InputTypes. Swipe left and right to edit the desired InputType
Split mode cannot apply keyboard layout. To apply the keyboard layout you edited, turn off split mode.
You can\'t increase the keyboard size in keys cafe. adjust the keyboard size in Keyboard setting → Size and transparency
If there is a left or right margin between the keys, decrease the left or right margin.
When editing keyboard, click the \"Hi\" tab on the right side of the key tray and click the \"+\" button to create the desired text key.
How can I modify the keyboard layout?
Is there any way to delete the key?
How can I add a new key to the keyboard?
can\'t see alternative character on the keyboard even if i set up the alternative character.
Custom Layout is not applied in Split mode.
How to increase height of keyboard?
Can\'t put key in empty space between the keys
How to make the key i want?
Yes, you can share after creating my own keyboard.
Use share via email / Quick share, etc. via newly created share button on keyboard layout application / release tab.
Because of Google policy, downloaded files cannot be executed immediately on the Chrome browser. Please execute in Samsung file browser (my file).
Can I share my own keyboard with other phones?
How to share my keyboard layout with others?
I downloaded the keyboard layout created by someone else, but it can not run on the Chrome browser.
Save Sally in crisis by blocking raindrops with typing.
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
